name: General Contractors
tagline: Remodelers and builders with no place to point a lead.
display_description: Sweeps for general contractors and remodelers near you who have the reviews but no website. Big-ticket work, decided on trust — and right now a homeowner researching a $40k remodel finds nothing to back them up.
outreach_voice_brief: Write to a builder who closes jobs on a handshake. Use the real detail — years of reviews, no website. Make the case that remodels are high-trust buys and the homeowner Googles the name before they sign; an empty result costs them the job to whoever has a page. Offer a site that shows past projects and takes a quote request. Plain, direct, one ask.
